slides.01: You spent crores making your film. On release day, someone records it in the theatre — and within 24 hours, your investment is leaking across the internet. You worked for months. It takes one phone to undo all of it.
slides.02: Indian producers lose 60 to 80 percent of their revenue to piracy — and there is nothing they can do about it. No evidence. No control. Just loss.
slides.03: We built a system that detects piracy, proves it, and removes it — automatically, without you doing anything. Your film is protected before you even know there is a problem.
slides.04: Introducing the Takedown System — India's first fully automated anti-piracy engine. The moment your film is released, it starts working. Detecting, verifying, filing, removing, blocking, and reporting — all without a single human touch. Nothing gets through.
slides.05: Your film releases. Piracy attempts start on day one. Our Takedown System is already running — scanning every platform, every minute. AI fingerprint matching identifies even a 3-second clip from a dark cinema. The moment a match is confirmed, DMCA notices are filed automatically. No human involved. No delays. Your film is protected.
slides.06: The moment piracy is detected, six automated steps fire in sequence — no human input, no delays. Step one: scan 50-plus platforms. Step two: AI verifies with 99.8 percent confidence. Step three: DMCA notice filed in under 30 seconds. Step four: content removed from all regions. Step five: permanent re-upload block activated. Step six: full report delivered to you. Start to finish — minutes, not days.
slides.07: Your film is protected everywhere piracy happens. YouTube takedowns in 10 minutes. Instagram and Facebook removed within 1 hour. Telegram channels shut down within 24 hours. Torrent sites and illegal streaming platforms cleared within 72 hours. Every platform. Every copy. Handled automatically.
slides.08: To remove pirated content at scale, platforms require authorized API access. Four documents — Digital Rights Certificate, Content ID fingerprint, Metadata, and chain of title Documentation. Submit them once. After that, the system removes thousands of pirated links per hour — automatically, legally, across every platform. Once granted, it never expires.
slides.09: Your Producer Dashboard shows everything in real time. Over 1200 piracy links found. 96 percent removed successfully. A live breakdown by platform — YouTube leads at 58 percent. Instant alerts the moment a new piracy link appears. You do nothing — but you always know your film is safe.
slides.10: Before — 80 percent of revenue lost, no control, no evidence, no hope. After — revenue protected from day one, automatic 24/7 piracy removal, court-ready evidence always available. Your film releases and stays yours. That is our promise.
